title: Studio
description: The top-level container for a creative AI studio. A studio defines agents, artifact types, stores, playbooks, quality criteria, and knowledge - everything needed to describe how creative work is done.

description.description: Description of what this studio does and its creative domain

version.description: Semantic version of this studio definition

constitution.description: Inviolable principles all agents must follow

agents.description: Agents that can perform work in this studio. Can be inline objects or file paths (manifest pattern).

entry_agent.description: The agent that interfaces with external customers. Must reference an agent with is_entry_agent=true.

entry_agents.description: Named entry points mapped to agent IDs (e.g., { 'authoring': 'showrunner', 'playtest': 'player_narrator' }). Alternative to single entry_agent when multiple contexts need different entry points.

constitution_ref.description: File path to constitution definition (manifest pattern alternative to inline constitution)

oneOf.description: File path to artifact type definition

artifact_types.description: Types of artifacts that can be created in this studio. Can be inline objects or file paths.

oneOf.description: File path to asset type definition

asset_types.description: Types of binary assets that can be stored in this studio. Can be inline objects or file paths.

stores.description: Storage locations for artifacts and assets. Can be inline objects or file paths.

playbooks.description: Playbooks defining how work flows through the studio. Can be inline objects or file paths.

tools.description: Tool definitions available to agents. Can be inline objects or file paths.

oneOf.description: File path to quality criteria definition

quality_criteria.description: Quality criteria used to validate work. Can be inline objects or file paths.

knowledge.description: Knowledge entries available to agents. Can be inline objects or file paths.

knowledge_config.description: File path to knowledge layer configuration (e.g., 'knowledge/layers.json')

studio_defaults.description: Default values for studio workflow behavior. Note: Flow control settings (mailbox sizes, backpressure thresholds) are runtime configuration, not domain knowledge - configure those in RuntimeConfig.

default_store.description: Default store for artifacts without a specified store

default_quality_criteria.description: Quality criteria applied by default to all work

quality.description: Quality workflow settings (design decisions, not runtime tuning)

escalation_after_rework.description: Whether to escalate to human after max rework cycles exceeded

authors.description: People who created this studio definition
